lineSample: 管理系统权限、角色和用户权限分配

Workflow admin: full access including rules / SLA configuration.
HR: approves long leave and maintains balance records.
Line manager: approves short leave (routed by Drools).
Regular employee: can submit and view own leave requests and balance.
